name: Notice.AAA6.JR.Cancelled.Case.Stayed.Claimant
titleCy: Mae’r achos wedi cael ei atal
descriptionEn: The case has been stayed. The CCJ you requested has been cancelled. You will need to request a new CCJ when the stay is lifted.
descriptionCy: Mae’r achos wedi’i ohirio. Mae’r CCJ y gwnaethoch ofyn amdano wedi’i chanslo. Bydd angen i chi wneud cais am CCJ newydd pan fydd yr ohiriad yn cael ei godi.
